Sea grapes compared

Kingdom Animalia

Updated Jan 13

Here’s how to tell apart these two green seaweeds with little round shapes.

More comparisons

Oval green seaweed (left) and Round sea grapes (right)
Parasol green seaweed Caulerpa peltata
Small parasol green seaweed Caulerpa racemosa var peltata
Bubble green seaweed Boergesenia forbesii
Beaded cushion green seaweed Valonia sp.
Green sea sausage seaweed Bornetella sp.
